weather.summary: Saturday: 15°C, clear sky. Sunday: 14°C, clear sky

metadata.greeting: This weekend is looking amazing for outdoor adventures! I've found some fantastic activities in Hackney and beyond, from exploring city farms to enjoying free events at the Southbank Centre. Get ready for a fun-filled weekend!

activities.title: Hackney City Farm
activities.description: Meet farmyard animals, explore the gardens, and enjoy a slice of the countryside in the heart of Hackney.
activities.whyItWorks: Hands-on experience with animals, outdoor space to roam, sensory experience.

transport.tip: Check website for workshops and events.

activities.title: Spitalfields City Farm
activities.description: Get up close with goats, sheep, and chickens in this charming city farm.
activities.whyItWorks: Compact farm, easy to navigate with toddlers, animal encounters.

transport.tip: Check for special events and feeding times.

activities.title: Victoria Park
activities.description: Explore playgrounds, splash in the paddling pool (seasonal), and enjoy wide open green spaces.
activities.whyItWorks: Multiple playgrounds, paddling pool for warm days, lots of space to run.

transport.fromHackney: Buses 277, 425
transport.tip: Check for events on the park's website.

activities.title: Mudchute Park and Farm
activities.description: One of the largest city farms, with a wide range of animals and activities.
activities.whyItWorks: Large site with diverse animals, good for a longer visit, plenty of space to explore.

transport.fromHackney: DLR to Mudchute
transport.tip: Check for special events and workshops.

activities.title: Museum of the Home
activities.description: Explore historical room displays and gardens, offering a glimpse into homes through the ages.
activities.whyItWorks: Gardens to explore, interesting room displays, sensory elements.

transport.tip: Check for family-friendly activities.

activities.title: Young V&A
activities.description: A museum dedicated to creativity and design for children, with interactive exhibits.
activities.whyItWorks: Interactive exhibits, hands-on activities, designed for young children.

transport.tip: Allow plenty of time to explore, check for workshops.

activities.title: REPLAY: A Limitless Recycled Playground
activities.description: Explore a world of play and invention in a recycled playground for children and their grown-ups.
activities.whyItWorks: Recycled materials, creative play, good for imagination

transport.fromHackney: Overground to Shoreditch High Street, then tube to Waterloo
transport.tip: Check Southbank Centre website for times

activities.title: Samuel Laurence Cunnane: Blue Road
activities.description: Exhibition at the Southbank Centre.
activities.whyItWorks: Free, good to explore

transport.fromHackney: Overground to Shoreditch High Street, then tube to Waterloo
transport.tip: Check Southbank Centre website for times

activities.title: Natural History Museum
activities.description: Explore dinosaurs, animals, and the wonders of the natural world.
activities.whyItWorks: Dinosaur exhibits, interactive displays, suitable for all ages.

transport.fromHackney: Tube: Overground to Highbury and Islington, then Victoria line to South Kensington
transport.tip: Arrive early to avoid long queues, check for family trails.

activities.title: Science Museum
activities.description: Discover interactive exhibits and learn about science and technology.
activities.whyItWorks: Wonderlab (paid) for hands-on experiments, interactive displays, suitable for all ages.

transport.fromHackney: Tube: Overground to Highbury and Islington, then Victoria line to South Kensington
transport.tip: Book Wonderlab in advance, check for free shows.

activities.title: Golders Hill Park Zoo
activities.description: A small, free zoo with a variety of animals.
activities.whyItWorks: Free entry, manageable size for toddlers, animals to see.

transport.fromHackney: Tube: Northern Line to Golders Green
transport.tip: Combine with a visit to the playground in the park.

activities.title: British Museum
activities.description: Discover world history and culture, with Egyptian mummies and ancient artifacts.
activities.whyItWorks: Activity trails, explorer backpacks, impressive artifacts.

transport.fromHackney: Tube: Central Line to Holborn or Tottenham Court Road
transport.tip: Get an activity trail from the family desk.

activities.title: Diana Memorial Playground
activities.description: A large playground with a pirate ship theme.
activities.whyItWorks: Large playground, sensory trail, teepees, plenty of seating

transport.fromHackney: Tube: Central Line to Notting Hill Gate or Queensway
transport.tip: Can get crowded, arrive early.

activities.title: Horniman Museum and Gardens
activities.description: Explore natural history, musical instruments, and gardens.
activities.whyItWorks: Gardens, farm animals, hands-on workshops, aquarium (paid).

transport.fromHackney: Overground to Forest Hill
transport.tip: Check for workshops and events on the website.

activities.title: Vaisakhi on the Square
activities.description: Celebrate Sikh culture with music, dance, and food.
activities.whyItWorks: Music, dance, cultural experience, free

transport.fromHackney: Tube: Overground to Shoreditch High Street, then tube to Charing Cross
transport.tip: Can get crowded, arrive early

activities.title: St George's Day 2026
activities.description: Celebrate England and English culture.
activities.whyItWorks: Music, dance, cultural experience, free

transport.fromHackney: Tube: Overground to Shoreditch High Street, then tube to Charing Cross
transport.tip: Can get crowded, arrive early

activities.title: We're Going on a Bear Hunt
activities.description: Musical stage version of Michael Rosen's beloved book.
activities.whyItWorks: Audience participation, live music, short performance.

transport.fromHackney: Tube: Overground to Highbury and Islington, then Victoria line to Wimbledon
transport.tip: Book tickets in advance.

activities.title: Spring Family Fun
activities.description: A festival of fun and creativity for families, including shows, music, puppetry, and free activities.
activities.whyItWorks: Variety of activities, something for everyone, relaxed approach.

transport.fromHackney: Overground to Shoreditch High Street, then tube to Waterloo
transport.tip: Study the program beforehand and make bookings.

activities.title: Imagine Children's Festival
activities.description: UK's leading arts festival for children with music, storytelling, dance, crafts, and comedy.
activities.whyItWorks: Multi-artform program, activities listed by age, relaxed approach.

transport.fromHackney: Overground to Shoreditch High Street, then tube to Waterloo
transport.tip: Study the program beforehand and make bookings.

activities.title: Tower of London - Duke and Disorderly
activities.description: Discover eclectic characters connected to the Tower's history and early 19th century London.
activities.whyItWorks: Historical attraction, engaging characters

transport.fromHackney: Tube: District or Circle Line to Tower Hill
transport.tip: Check website for times

activities.title: London Transport Museum - Caribbean Connections
activities.description: Creative arts and crafts, costumed characters inspired by Caribbean heritage.
activities.whyItWorks: Creative activities, cultural experience

transport.fromHackney: Tube: Central line to Holborn
transport.tip: Check website for times

activities.title: Harry Styles' Meltdown
activities.description: The culture-defining artist curates the 31st edition of Meltdown.
activities.whyItWorks: Musical experience

transport.fromHackney: Overground to Shoreditch High Street, then tube to Waterloo
transport.tip: Check Southbank Centre website for times

activities.title: Paddington the Musical
activities.description: A musical adaptation of the Paddington Bear stories.
activities.whyItWorks: Family favourite character, musical experience.

transport.fromHackney: Tube: Overground to Highbury and Islington, then Victoria line to Embankment
transport.tip: Book tickets in advance

activities.title: Matilda the Musical
activities.description: A musical adaptation of Roald Dahl's Matilda.
activities.whyItWorks: Family favourite story, musical experience.

transport.fromHackney: Tube: Overground to Highbury and Islington, then Victoria line to Covent Garden
transport.tip: Book tickets in advance
